category_sources: source_facts.description says ssh-vault encrypts/decrypts using SSH keys.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives ssh-vault; source_facts.homepage uses the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project site; source_facts.repo is the official repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ssh-vault/ssh-vault, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names encryption/decryption with SSH keys; source_facts.executables lists the CLI executable.
